name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyBalanceHelper.ArmsOutOnPushTimeout
summary: Number of seconds before turning off the armsOutOnPush response only for Arms out based on lean2 of the legs (NOT for the angle or angular velocity).
remarks:
Default value = 1.1f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
